channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Stocks will be sideways at best this year Gold has no reason for buying power to step in again Your best bet this year i… — 49 replies — 196.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Stocks will be sideways at best this year Gold has no reason for buying power to step in again Your best bet this year i…

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-03-29 03:18 UTC

OP

Stocks will be sideways at best this year
Gold has no reason for buying power to step in again

Your best bet this year is BTC. Prove me wrong

Early replies (first 3)

62038234
>>62038225
Stop posting CP
Also I’ve lost so much money recently it’s going to take me hopefully 5yrs again to break even.

62038243
If your best bet is BTC, then MSTR is the best bet as it's an engine that accretes more BTC continuously.

62038259
ive never seen such a young man

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62038721
Dude are getting plenty of attentions frok post wall foids.

62039026
>>62038274
getting angry at it just increases its power

62039043
>>62038225
posting minors on 4chan now? you should feel ashamed

62039121
>>62038225
this boy looks so young, are you sure you can post him on this site?

62039156
>>62038225
>Your best bet this year is BTC. Prove me wrong
There are a bunch of better plays that will pump harder next year.

62039163
>>62038333
The amount of seething from zoomers is unbelievable, I live near a college campus and regularly see bald or wrinkled people walking around in clothes for teens and it takes me a second to figure out that they're not 50yos trying to relive their youth, but incredibly aged and fucked up looking 18yos.

62039725
>>62038355
That dude has horrible genetics and looks his age. I actually love cocky zoomers like you, specially the ones that are already showing signs of baldness and nasolabia wrinkles in their early to mid 20s. My father is pushing 70 and looks like hes in his late 40s so i know how i will age over time. Sorry you didnt win the genetic lottery, keep on malding zoom zoom.

62039736
>>62039163
Yeah i think they are traumatized with how badly they are aging nowadays. Some zoomers in their early 20s look like they are in their 30s. I would also be coping like these retards if i was in the same boat ngl must be brutal
>Eheh at least age number says im young!
Yeah cope harder zoomtards lmao

62039737
>>62039725
Is that all it is? My Dad looks great too but he still gets up at 3:39 to go to the gym in the morning. He's almost 70.

I feel part of me retaining my looks is all the exercise and healthy eating he made me do that zooms def aren't getting.

62039764
>>62038593
You don't really lose money if the cash is worth more when you sell. But you lose money from inflation with the cash in the bank. This is how I see the PM investments. Keep some money in a bank account for emergencies and deflation. PMs for inflation and rare gold bull runs every few decades.

62039767
>>62039737
Its not all. The most important factors are genetics, stress level, sleep quality, diet and sunlight exposure. Intense exercise ages you, you should do moderate exercise only. The people that lived the longest did moderate exercise daily throughtout their entire life (daily tasks stuff that make your body move and be active)

62039774
Another nice ultrasonography, can't wait for him to be born

62040216
>>62038274
you will never age gracefully with that attitude

62040227
>>62038274
>seething at his looks

62040284
>>62038333
That's why it is memed. It was necessary.

62040416
>>62038225
I don't take investment advice from 17 yr old boys anon. Go frolic outside kiddo, leave the market to us grownups.

62040501
>>62038274
Hag cope

62040509
>>62038333
The boy is literally me.
Im 31 and I just had someone tell me I look 23

62040512
>>62038225

62040544
>>62039725
your kids must feel so lucky lol

62042262
>>62040509
im 40 and a girl said i look 24, we are all gonna make it

62042471
>>62038225
It is okay, if that's your selfie you are 16 at most, so you have time to invest

62043286
>>62038274
All good Memes are good because some people get triggered by them

62043287
>>62038333
>>62040284
Yes exactly. And yes im one of them and people call me 5 years younger often. But most people think they look younger.

62046138
>>62043287
In fact a girl who is 30 and looks 30 just told me people "think" aka tell her she looks 5 years younger.

62046388
>>62038274
old hands typed this

62046408
>>62038333
I mean, I am a millennial that's mistaken for being younger, but for 25ish instead of being a high schooler. I never knew that was a stereotype until the meme came out.

62046524
>>62038225
Sincerely, i wish this young man the best.

62046541
>>62038225
I'd trade all my BTC just to be as young as this boy again

62046555
cute lil fella, looks like he's gonna grow up to be a strong man

item.title: -5.2 billion dollars after 6 years of DCA — 39 replies — 61.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
-5.2 billion dollars after 6 years of DCA

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-03-29 02:50 UTC

OP

this nigga is coping hard

Early replies (first 3)

62040721
>REFINANCE, WHERE MICHAEL?

>DDDD

62040752
>>62038894
Mstr will be at 4k in 5 years and you will eat shit nigger

62040776
>>62038894
ITS ALL PART OF THE PLAN YOU WOULDNT GET IT

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62041479
>>62038894
how do i give this guy my money

62041552
>>62041479
You convinced me, I wanna know too

62041934
Some other anon in /smg/ told me they're aiming for a 11% dividend yield or something, but all i see is a CEO that post cringe tweets. Must be tough bagholding this

62042057
>>62041421
Lmao

62042072
>>62041934
Extremely bullish post

62042260
>>62041934
Where the fuck would the money even come from?

62042308
>>62038894
He is still up billions with his Micro Strategy Stock

62042319
>>62042260
bitcoin is going to go up because of the rainbow chart and because its GOING TO GO UP BECAUSE THERE'S ONLY HECKIN 21M BITCUNTS OUT THERE

62043624
>>62040752
Saylor, what are you doing here?

62043627
>>62040752
well said. it sucks dealing with all these sub 130 IQ cattle. imagine unironically shilling for the dollar and jewish banking system lmao

62043648
Whenever I see somebody wearing their own merch I immediately short their stock

62043658
>>62043648
Thank you for your contribution. I look forward to liquidating you

62043660
>>62041934
I told you that. And they aren’t “aiming for it”, they’re doing it. Pop in the /quant/ thread and I’ll sperg out for you.

Do you realize that MSTR was the #1 most profitable company in the US for awhile? They were making something like $500m per day selling Bitcoin volatility through their products.

If you actually look into the capital/debt structure you’ll see they’re in a stellar position. If you want to be long BTC, MSTR is just the better choice. It’s an engine that accretes BTC, and they’re going to pivot to banking at some point.

62043666
>>62042260
They already have it. If you don’t know how MSTR makes money, maybe you should research it?

62043720
>>62038894
Kek

62043746
>>62038894
The problem is that this retard doesn't DCA. He keeps buying local tops in order to keep the price up. He barely averages down. Why didn't he buy at 60k when he recently had a chance? He waited like a retard for it to recover.
>>62041934
>>62043660
NEOS' BTCI gets you more than double that. They also have NEHI (Ethereum) which yields 35% kek.

62043754
>>62038894
tom lee thinks those are rookie numbers

62043767
>>62043746
>an illiquid leveraged ETF is the same as a liquid BTC accretion engine
itsallsotiresome.jpg

Also, they buy tops because that's when volatility is highest and they have the most premium/leverage to strip. Please take your IQ takes to /r/buttcoin

62043788
>>62043767
/r/iamverysmart
And what happens to MSTR if Bitcoin goes sup 30k for 3 years?

62043861
his ponzi thing was only above par and buying bitcoin for a couple days this entire month which means he has to pay everyone out of his cash reserves

62043863
>>62043788
>And what happens to MSTR if Bitcoin goes sup 30k for 3 years?
Literally nothing, they could half that price for twice as long at current reserves and obligations. Not hard to figure this shit out yourself.

62043993
>>62038894
Michael Saylor is retarded. Even Epstein called him a retard. It seems obvious to anyone who isn't a retard that this guy isn't worth the attention.

62044254
>>62043627
Bitcoin is a jewish ponzi scheme and they want you to buy it instead of land, gold or guns

62044260
>>62038894
Just short when Gaylord buys.
Go all in when he gets liquidated.

Simple as

62045094
>>62043767
How is it illiquid or leveraged you peak dunning kruger ape? Holy cringe.

62045912
>>62043863
>you could half that price
Halve*
They’re hiring pajeets to fight fud now

62046476
>>62045094
Because it’s literally an illiquid leveraged ETF, dumbo? Just read its description and check volume lmao

item.title: ½ Trillion Gone — 66 replies — 29.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
½ Trillion Gone

Open thread • Replies: 66 • Updated: 2026-03-29 01:15 UTC

OP

The US stock market wiped out $500 Billion dollars today. You did sell all your goyboxes, didn't you anon?

Early replies (first 3)

62036869
Haha, just kidding. It was actually a $1 Trillion dollars.

62036893
i bought the dip
panicans lose
TTP

62036894
unless you're a day trader none of this matters and even if you're a day trader still none of this matters you will lose your money regardless. fud doesn't work on proper investment strategies. longing the market won game over bye bye pink wojaks farming crypto queer

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62037324
>>62036969
That's good news for the immortal among us here.

62037377
>>62036853
>price goes down $0.01
>SEVENTY HUNDRED BAZILLION DOLALRY DOOS WAS DELOOTED FROM DA MARKAT!
the stupidity is oh so tiresome.

62037382
>>62037377
it's the same people who want to tax unrealized gains

62037404
>>62036908
Lucky you.

62037409
>>62036935
Damn gold still up 2% ytd. I should buy more of it but I've become completely detached from all my holds.

62037465
>>62037377
It's concerning from a tax receipts perspective when your government's military and entitlement spending are 104% of receipts and $40 trillion in debt. Perhaps it is that equity movement is just noise but if the bond market breaks this little hiccup will be seen as an appetizer to the screaming. From a political perspective someone who makes the markets being strong his only feature and continues to destabilize them through retarded decisions is similarly concerning but it will cull the weak and a lot of entities caught in the crossfire. Indians are sliming each other out over gas right now, you don't realize how bad it's going to get. Even if we stopped today it could be too late. Democrats are salivating as if their ascension could do anything to alleviate the horrors. Mo money fo dem programs does not a balanced budget make. If one is secure in his employment he could do quite well but that's predicated upon all the ones that aren't getting fucked and consumed by the dying empire. It'll be hell but finally the bottom can fall out, the useless and unlucky cast aside, chuds will reign just by having access to food and shelter. The idea of 100k 1/4 ton trucks dies since no ones wages are meaningfully going up. The management class and bean counters get decimated. Today is not nothing, as a single event it would be negligible but as a part of the larger picture it's the embodiment of everything getting worse following blind optimism.

62037470
>>62037465
Americans have infinite money

62037482
>minis 1%
can't even care, wake me up with a real crash of 12-15+%

62037501
perhaps today was not the best day to try to get into trading methinks

62037510
You can always tell the /pol/faggots apart because they think that even the worst market downturn in history is some kind of spiral that will never end. They're unironically the same kind of faggots that get hyped up when a hurricane comes in and keep spamming about it when it's already gone hoping the death toll will rise. Total fucking losers lol

62037531
Whoever made this trade is probably dead now with a bullet in the head.

62037566
>>62036853
>DJIA dropped 1%
>S&P 500 dropped 1.7%
>Nasdaq-100 dropped 2.4%
OMG it's a fucking nothingburger! However can the West survive an event of this insignificance!

62037573
>>62037465
>It's concerning from a tax receipts perspective
Only if you're Dutch. Americans don't have a tax on unrealized capital gains.

62037605
>>62037510
Japanese women are so pleased with themselves!
They saved the japanese stock market with their female japanese asian women tendencies and birthrates and JAV appearances.
The yen was saved.
The japanese race is saved!

62037625
>>62037470
Its actually kind of crazy how many people don't realize this and keep acting like we should try to bring our wars in under budget. The money is infinite. It always has been infinite, it always will be infinite. There is enough money to drop a six million dollar missile on top of every individual brown person on the planet, it makes absolutely no difference.

62037699
>>62036969
Even though that chart is calculated “without inflation” it’s still affected by it.
In that there’s still a gravitational pull from scared fiat looking to park itself. So participation still increases in absolute terms.

62037786
>>62036853
I voted for this

62037819
>>62037501
It’s unironically a great day. Investing is the opposite of traffic lights. Buy red. Hold green. Sell calls and puts for premiums when it crabs. It’s really that simple. Theres going to be a lot of money made on shipping, weapons, and oil for anyone with a brain. If the market trends down invest in coffee. Its a really undersold defensive because white bitches no matter how broke will never give up their Starslops.

62038287
>>62037625
Your fucking retarded, America has crumbling infrastructure, no real manufacturing base, gutted educational standards, no major sources of economic growth accounting for inflation and a decimated middle.

The 8+ trillion plus dollars and other resources we spent on the middle east forever wars, could have easily propelled America into a global economic behemoth that dwarfs China and the rest of planet if it was well invested.

62038473
>>62036908
LMAO

62038644
>>62038287
But muh national security

62038720
>>62037293
we are also living in an era where anyone with a smartphone can be there own broker. kids growing up today are investing into markets which will keep the trend line up more than ever before. compound these facts with rampant consumerism. it's not a good time to be a bear generally speaking

62042487
>>62037625
Do you perhaps work for the Treasury Dept under the Trump administration?
You sound just retarded enough.

62042521
>>62036853
Insanely bullish for gold.

62042954
>>62036869
WHAT THE FUCK 1,000,0000,00000 TRILLONS YOU MEAN? HOW THE FUCK THE FED PRINTED SO MANY FAKE MONEY?? LMFAO

62043042
>>62036869
woooooooow so many zeroes

62043961
>>62036853
I voted for this

62045345
>>62037625
money is a measurement of value, and you can't print value. all this spending and inflation has yet come home to roost

62046233
>>62043042
how much is 1 trillion trillion

62046276
>>62037465
it's funny how ukrainians have such an inflated ego. They kidnap people from the streets to send them to war and they think they can teach america about war? kek

>>62015802
Why do you think about LINK all day, every day? Oh that's right, you're a link baggie too.
Kek baggie

62017387
>>62015802
Anon, just so you know that one of the reason I'm still holding this piece of shit LINK is you. The day you stop posting here I am selling. You give me hopium. Thanks.

62017472

The whole market is down stupid

62018502
I HATE ALL FREAKIN STIIIIIINKS and will forever more

62022852
bumparino :}

62022933
>>62015802

62023622
stinkies are coping with FOLDERS now :} the patheticness speaks for itself

62024698
fuck STIN K lol

62025843
all yhat matters is the paiiin of stiiink

62028212
>>62017472
fuck off stinkie

62028237
just let the thread die, you faggot

62028302
You are mentally ill :}

62028494
>>62028237
make me
make me let it die :}
this thread is here for the truth

>>62028302
you're seethin' :}

62029960
>9 peels by this ID
what a loser lmao

62030842
i'll never forgive you worthless stinkoids xD

62030875
>>62030842
>>62015802
Yeah, I'm thinking based. Never let them live their heavy bags down, remind them about how pompous and smug they were thinking people will write books and post stories about their success.
>I know what I got!
kekbaggies

62033417
everybody hates u stupid stinks
we loathe you more than almost anything
fuck every single mother fuckin stink
you're all the worst we hate you so dang much
fuck all stinkies fuck em all foreverrrrr

62035341
abloobloo:}

62038348
pain and misery :}

62038356
DR;NS

62038404
Stinks have LOST

62038406
Watching people shitpost about each other’s shitcoins feels like watching a cripple fight.

62040244
burp :}

62041180
>>62030875
Didn’t that one jew they love, Ari Juels, write a book on their dime? So there was a book published, just a piece of fiction.

62043950
hate em all hate em alllll :}

62044829
s :}

62045138
say it stinkies. say "i deserve nothing but the 4 curses that befall all stinkies: pain, misery, humiliation, and incel rage/cuckoldry" XD

62045180
>>62015802
Will you still post this crap when link blasts through $100 and keeps going? Or will that be the end of this fun for you?

62046271
>>62045180
i think... i think he. actually. believes this xD

item.title: KNEEL — 14 replies — 12.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
KNEEL

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-29 02:19 UTC

OP

KNEEL

Early replies (first 3)

62040827
Bottomtober buyer here

We will be vindicated just watch

62040995
>>62040692
I kneel (so I can uppercut this faggot harder and knock his worthless head off his shoulders)

62041017
Can't help remembering his chainlink summer of dreams video but yeah, he's been right for the last 6 months.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62041106
Did he say anything about the price he expects us to hit in October?

62041113
>>62041106
Around the 200 week MA

62041210
>>62040995
An MTG "bear" is a generic 2/2 so 8 bears would have 16 power and toughness ya dumb faggot.

62041216
>>62041113
Isn't that too high? The 200wma is at $59k rn.
I was expecting something around $40k.

62041236
>>62041216
Well, that's his "reasonable" target. He always says that's a pretty good price to start buying. His thesis is that we will be going sideways around that price for months.

62041313
>>62041106
4k

62042850
extended cycles

62042913
>>62040692
Cash is king

62042963
Saving every cent and patiently for octover to finally begin my bitcoin journey

62045104
he finally recanted, 4 years later
>its a really bad feeling to sell the top and then not buy back in.
he finally admitted he missed the bottom like the drooling mongoloid that he is.
>it is ok to be a bear in a bear market but it is not ok to be a permabear on a bull market, i learn that the hard way.
what a fucking clown.
and to think that there are "people" in this board that religiously watch every fucking video of his , hes worse than capo.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LUEsxFQpa0c

62046422
>>62042850
this
came to say this
this motherfucker kept repeating
>lengthening cycles
>lengthening cycles
>lengthening cycles
>lengthening cycles
>lengthening cycles
day after fucking day
and all of the pathetic betas forgot all about it.
Like a bunch of goyim with memory of a goldfish.
Never trust this kyk

item.title: What's going to replace the US dollar? I don't think we'll get the PetroYuan at least any time soon even in this generat… — 34 replies — 11.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
What's going to replace the US dollar? I don't think we'll get the PetroYuan at least any time soon even in this generat…

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-03-29 00:35 UTC

OP

What's going to replace the US dollar? I don't think we'll get the PetroYuan at least any time soon even in this generation, it's more likely we'll be going back to Gold and Silver standards as the entire economy sharts itself.

Early replies (first 3)

62039586
>>62039580
Didn't they say in Agenda 2030 or the Great Reset or something that we're switching to Central Bank Digital Currency?

62039592
>>62039580
dogecoin clearly

62039597
>>62039580
CBDCs
This is obviously controlled demolition, US empire is on exit door for long time now. CBDCs, IDs to verify identity using any and all OS, constant CCTV monitoring.... we are going to a cyberpunk dystopia but without cool augments
That's why Elon and Trump had love hate relationship, because it was about this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62039677
>>62039580
The USD chart looks bullish to me actually, honestly the whole Iran situation is big bullish for the dollar imo, it's completel.y fucking voer the energy markets in Americas largest competitors, Asia and Europe, meanwhile the US has just started receiving large amounts of oil from Venezuela and is already energy independent.

62039886
>>62039580
Ether

62039911
I don't know how anyone can still have faith in this shit
https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0425

62039988
>>62039580
There's not enough gold and silver in the world to replace the dollar. Physical metals just don't work at the scale and speed that the world needs.
I do feel like there has to be something, some invention, that could solve the medium of exchange issue for world trade so that countries don't have to rely on a single nation's economy and its currency to be able to trade with each other. Some economist will invent it at some point in the future and everybody will be like how didn't we think of this earlier.

62040044
>>62039988
>There's not enough gold and silver in the world to replace the dollar

This never made sense to me, if there's not enough then you just make it really expensive and divide it into smaller amounts like with BTC right?

62040053
>>62039677
>muh lines on a chart
you're no better than astrologist

62040079
>>62040044
I think you want to be able to produce new currency when it's needed, otherwise, there won't be enough money in the system to go around and economic growth slows. If this sounds hand-wavy, it's because I don't understand it properly myself. Also, you can't instantly wire 5 tons of gold between banks like you can with currency. You have to fly it to the destination bank, which takes time, money, and exposes the gold to theft, which means you have to hire heavy security, which increases cost.

62040283
>>62039597
> IDs to verify identity using any and all OS, constant CCTV monitoring
... Palantir...

62040299
>>62039988

XRP

62040300
>>62039580
No single reserve currency but rather you can trade in multiple currencies like the USD, Euro, Yen, etc

62040467
>>62039592
>>62039886
>>62040299

no.

The correct answer is Bitcoin. Everything else is wrong.

62040476
>>62040299
>>62040467
Nobody cares about your shitty little ponzi coins.

62040499
>>62039586
This literally wouldn't work because of shit like conflict minerals and general 3rd world. How are the Africans mining coltan in the middle of an ethnic genocide for Semiconductor Inc. going to get paid in Dem.Congo with digital stuff.

62040502
>>62040499
Tatted white women?

62040556
>>62040476

Uniformed commentary is for people who enjoy poverty.

62040562
>>62039580
Goypoints.

62040600
>>62040556
Bro, even if the central banks wanted to use crypto, they'd just pick one and clone it. They're not going to pay you anything for your imaginary internet funny money.

62040622
>>62040600

> central banks

How's the weather in Tel Aviv, rabbi?

62040632
>>62039580
>What's going to replace the US dollar?

Nothing, everyone else is in a worse off state than the US with massive demographic bubbles and they're inflating their way out.

62040653
>>62039580
>it's more likely we'll be going back to Gold and Silver standards
this is baggie cope
pms are just another asset to be pumped and dumped, nothing more

62040674
>>62039580
Government backed stablecoins
Have you not been following the news over the past couple years? Every major economic market is trying to kill money and circumvent banking to achieve total control.

62040684
>>62039677
The usd value is the result of a trust engine. The moment the qorld stops trusting it as a reserve and/or trade currency, it will become argentinian peso-tier. They are going to have a worse currency devaluation spiral than the late roman empire.

62040693
>>62039592
The only correct answer.

62041375
>>62039988
They already did invent it and it's been running continuously for over 17 years.

62041515
>>62039597
All political parties, feds and billionaires who collude with feds along w big tech want to do this and we’re all moving towards this so they can disenfranchise people with stasi shit without even firing a shot.

62042255
>>62039597
>US empire
Here's that meme again. There is no such thing. You fell for the neocon rhetoric + Hollywood theatrics but can't let go.

62042497
>>62039580
Gold and silver are not feasible as a form of currency in a world of 9-10b people.
It's almost certainly going to be some form of digital currency, likely in the form of CBDC's.

62042643
>>62039580
>What's going to replace the US dollar?
Last time I checked, the US dollar was just a specific weight of silver or gold, I think your reference is to the Federal Reserve's notes

62044279
>>62040674
why would the government create stablecoins, that would be retarded as fuck, if anything the government would actively ban stablecoins (like china) or just tolerate their existence (like USA)

62046170
>>62039580
>What's going to replace the US dollar?
Nothing. It's over.
Sure they will try to replace it with some CBDC, but it will only delay the inevitable.

item.title: TICK TOCK WAGIE! — 18 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
TICK TOCK WAGIE!

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-29 01:52 UTC

OP

THOSE 48 HOURS WILL PASS IN A FLASH!

62044578
how do some of these niggers post the same thread for years. I same-post for sometimes weeks but then I get so bored. I guess if you're a creative hyper-mind like me then being a milquetoast same-post fag for years is literally impossible.

62044583

item.title: Holy fuck I hate taxes. I barely do anything but hold and sell here and there but it took literally all day and I'm stil… — 16 replies — 7.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Holy fuck I hate taxes. I barely do anything but hold and sell here and there but it took literally all day and I'm stil…

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-29 01:23 UTC

OP

Holy fuck I hate taxes.
I barely do anything but hold and sell here and there but it took literally all day and I'm still only halfway done.
Also looking at the loss I took last year was fucking painful. I turned 53ETH into 7ETH on a shitcoin. The loss will help offset some gains but fuck man unless turbotax fixed their csv input form, I'm going to have to manually enter 120 transactions.
FUCK TAXES

Early replies (first 3)

62038643
It's okay Tamaki-senpai. I can do your taxes for you

62038665
>>62038390
The funny part is knowing your taxes fund corruption. Complacency doesn't absolve you from being an accomplice, anon.

62039482
>>62038390
If you don’t live within Washington D.C. you aren’t legally required to file a 1099 Form. The same applies for states that lazily use the same form for their state tax systems. You only have to file in certain states with separate tax systems. You can also legally petition regarding your taxes, if you have grievances that are to be addressed.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62043916
I managed to finish my taxes. 10.4% effective tax rate which kinda sucks. I got in a good rhythm copying my trades watching an antis*mite stream into the STUPID FUCKING WEB INTERFACE TURBOTAX DOESN'T ACCEPT CSV FILE UPLOADS ANYMORE IT'S FUCKING RETARDED

Anyway I'm half expecting an audit because of how the IRS wanted me to file my swaps. No way to add notes explaining why I took almost $70k in losses. But they're getting money out of me anyway so maybe they won't care.

62043919
>>62038390
>give us our cut goy

62045063
>>62039482
This. Don't fall for it like the jab!!!
https://youtu.be/-11ps2MPmVA?si=GaNZweIlv1L_KIMU

62045075
>>62038390
Open turbo tax
Click import from fidelity
Send to IRS.

62045305
>>62045075
Yeah uhhhh I'm just not going to let a broker hold my assets for years and do shady shit with them I'm going to be my own bank and my keys my crypto
>not so fast -IRS
AAAAAAAIIIIIEEEEEEEE FUCKING COST BASIS AAAAAAAAGGGGHHHHH

62045342
>>62038390
kind of makes me glad I have no income tax in my state, but I get fucked on sales tax

62045358
>>62038390
>I'm going to have to manually enter 120 transactions.
I had 88k transactions in 2025 resulting in a total of 770k owed to the government even though I am actually down 500k for the year. I aggressively tax loss harvested at end of year but thanks to the new separate wallet accounting rules I accidentally sold a bunch of crypto with ultra low cost basis that I bought 3+ years ago, instead of the shit I bought 6 months ago at 5x the price it is now. Every year they make it more fake and gay to trade this stupid shit, just impose a 100% tax on it at this rate so I can on for good.

62045370
>>62043916
I actually had $3M in capital gains but $3.5M in derivatives trading losses (which is treated as income, not CG) since I got sucked into the hyperliquid/aster leveraged rape factories this year. If anyone's going to get audited it'll be me because I have these 80k trades showing I owe millions of dollars and then a single line item on my 1040 offhandedly mentioning I had a negative income of 3 million dollars this year. Luckily my service has a unofficial income report that I'll hope to attach that shows my usdc losses on these platforms line by line but it's not a real irs tax doc so probably won't do anything to stop them from flagging me for a no-lube deep probe.

62045428
>>62038665
>bro doesn't know that tax money is essentially just deleted from the economy and not actually reconstituted within state budget
you do realize that government can just print money and devalue our money that way, right? they don't NEED taxes, they could have made 0% tax and just tax us through printing more money if they wanted to
Taxes exist just to peg us softly

62045487
>>62038390
Your hard labor is funding jews who resent and despise you launching tomahawk missiles at schoolchildren and then building a social credit system surveillance prison that will disenfranchise you for having the wrong political opinion in private near a smart device.

62046211
>>62045370
>I actually had $3M in capital gains but $3.5M in derivatives trading losses (which is treated as income, not CG)
One thing I realized is that there's no reason to get involved in business with complicated tax filing systems. The money just is never worth the headache.
Swapping is pointless and not better than just buying and selling and holding.

>>62045487
1. I don't care 2. I don't have any say in the world I just live in it, I refuse any karmic debt/obligation.

62046256
They don't check all that shit if you are poor. If you just pay like $500 here and there they assume it was reported correctly

62046299
i am going to type a word, the word is nigfger and well that is apparently that

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 199 replies — 42.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 199 • Updated: 2026-03-28 22:49 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62034381
7,5$ top in 2028
+400% from ATL

62034423
>>62032967
This exercise is very elementary.

>And not saying to believe my Bullshit
Do you live in a bubble purposely living in blissful ignorance to the outside world so you can be content?

62034490
>>62034423
>Do you live in a bubble purposely living in blissful ignorance to the outside world so you can be content?
How so? What makes you think that?

62034856
>>62034423
>This exercise is very elementary.
So, what you're saying is that it's easy to do and therefore it's appropriate? And that it gets the point across and makes the person doing the experiment have the necessary experience in order to become aware of how the mind works? That's great!

62034890
>>62034490
Reread your posts
>>62034856
Maybe for a few. Better than none I guess

62034963
>>62034890
Right... So your point is?

62035196
>>62034381
grim

62035839
>>62034963
I didn't have one

62036344
>>62035839
Ok. So, ... You wanna talk about anything? Anything on your mind?

You said
>Maybe for a few. Better than none I guess
What would you like to know about the mind, if anything? If you don't think the exercise is appropriate then it's because you already understand, right? And if you tell me what you don't understand then we can start moving in that direction, right? Or don't tell me. It's up to you

62037187
>>62034101
>178 replies
>105 pbtid

oh I dunno

62037296
>>62037187
Gavin is paying me to keep the thread alive. This is how we live in Mumbai my good sir. We shill coins while talking about the mind.

62037323
>>62037187
I need rupees to worship the Vishnu on the blockchain my good sar. And to feed my village of Mumbai, the city of DOT.

62037509
>>62037296
>>62037323

Post hand

62039073
>>62037509
I already did here >>62008295. True Mumbai warrior hand. My fathers name was Kumar, my mothers name was Lakshmi. Pic related. I'm the little prince

62039085
>>62037509
I am now a Vishnu warrior of the blockchain, living in the city of DOT, Mumbai. I run a scam call center, they call me papa Rupee over here. I make many Rupees for many villages. We feed whole of city of DOT, Mumbai. We eat very good. Our bellies are very full.

62040207
>>62039073
>>62039085

Shitposting or on hard drugs constantly?

62040932
>>62040207
I don't get the question? Help me understand what you mean. And thanks for bumping the thread. Gavin Wood, our lord and saviour, will be very pleased with you.

May the blockchain Vishnu be with you good sar

62041893
>>62040932
Read again slowly

62042472
>>62041893
Yea..... You're asking me if I'm shitposting or on hard drugs constantly? That's your question? I can't decipher your half-formed sentences to be honest.

62043369
>>62042472
Simple yes or no

62044274
>>62043369
I can't answer if you can't formulate and define what the question is, right? So, please define the question and then I can answer it

62044411
i'm very sad for this investment

62044561
>>62044411
That sounds really tough my fren. Siddartha Gautama said "Attachment is the root cause of all suffering.". Just practice detachment and sooner or later you'll be able to accept your loss. Maybe even grief it if it's a big loss

62044605
>>62044411
May the Vishnu on the blockchain be with you

62044783
>>62044411
Another thing Siddartha Gautama said is that the only two things you're entitled two in life is suffering and death.

62045355
>>62044561
>>62044605
>>62044783

Not very encouraging to attract new buyers

62045388
>>62045355
Ah. How so?

62045442
>>62045388
Perhaps share influential news

We know DOT is a game changer in the Web world.

62045475
>>62045442
>Perhaps share influential news
Like what?

62045958
>>62045442
100$ end of bull run. Here are some influential news for you

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 80 replies — 20.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-03-28 23:30 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62033290
>>62024567
>switzerland euthanasia pods
oh ok so its a jew writing this thread so that white people are reminded about being sold suicide

62033391
>>62024567
what's the bull case? like, why will the value of the coin go up? just because you hope so? this is probably one of the worst times in the history of crypto to invest in shitcoins based on what's happening economically right now.

62033492
>Down to 200k
I would legitimately be retired if I had that much money, my break-even is around 60k if I work for a month a year on odd jobs.
Kind of weird looking back and seeing that I could be retired now at 27 if I just stuck with my last job for 2 more years and invested it all.

62034164
>>62033492
how can u retire with 200k lmao

62034249
>>62034164
>>62034164
That's enough if I was alone.
The FIRE safe withdrawal rate is 4% (although my main non-crypto investment has been doing 6-8% annually since 2018).

4% of 200k is 8000, which is 666 usd per month.
Just retire to a 3rd world country.
I used to rent a tiny 20sqm studio here for like 100 usd per month, and I would eat at street food places like pic related for $1 to $1.50 per meal Ate twice a day, paid $20 monthly for internet, just played or watched series movies and anime on my phone all day.

And ice here is like $25 to $35 a gram.
I actually lived that lifestyle for like 3 years, it was okay.

62034517
>>62034164
>Live with family
>No car no buy
That simple, I basically have to scrape together a couple hundred a month and I'm good.
And yes I can do it forever and never get kicked out.
I picked 200,000 because the official number is 150k if we factor in an average stock market growth, but I wanted a little cushion. In reality I'm gonna be doing some part-time work on the side so I wouldn't even be touching said most time, I don't really consider picking fruit at my uncle's farm for a couple hours "work."

My monthly expenses are probably 600 dollars or less.
>>62034249
Yeah I could go overseas too but I just live with family and basically have this life already.
It's actually crazy how cheap living is when you don't have a car or house payment, like I only work now to stack up money for future-proofing stuff. The cost is similar to having 3 roommates in a low cost of living area.

62034533
>>62034249
nigga my idea of retirement isnt living in a 3rd world country like the rest of you animals


i want a fucking bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms and importantly, in a first world country with fast internet

jesus you people are pathetic


>i want to retire at 27 so i can live like a poorfag in thailand

62034841
>>62034533
>i want a fucking bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms and importantly, in a first world country with fast internet
>jesus you people are patheti
ngmi

62035727
>>62034533
>you people are pathetic
Says the guy down to 200k to the person who is actually retired from the 2018 bullrun
>bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms
What for? I live right in the city, everything is walking distance. I have hired help that comes over to clean when I want them to, my laundry gets picked up and delivered to me, I don't need many rooms or a car, everything is walking distance.
Even several asian massage parlors are walking distance, I can get head or full service from hot asian girls while high, all within my budget
>fast internet
I can stream 4k, what else do you need?

>live like a poorfag
Hell nah.
I was just saying how you can make 200k work.
But personally I barely spend like $40k a year even though I can afford much more, and already live like a king compared to the locals here. Back when I was more of a stoner I was stoned 24/7 and it doesn't even make a dent in my budget.

62038112
>>62035727
>just retire so you can live impoverished in a 3rd world nation

man shut the fuck up

62038131
>>62024612
if youre taking xanax and accepting the shitty side effects (impaired math and decision making ability) just to balance out the stimulants, youre rapidly approaching rock bottom. voices should have been your sign. get off the drugs. memantine can block the effects of stimulants and make them less euphoric if you want to disincentivize yourself

62038628
>>62038112
>impoverished
Frame it however you want.
I'm living better than I've ever been ever in my life.
Been retired since 2018.
You're the one crying you're down to less than half your port lmao

I just suggested the expat lifestyle, don't see why you need to keep shitting on it if you don't think it's for you.

Man I haven't posted in biz in like 2 years, I only take a peek every 1-2 months for a tiny bit, only posted in this thread expecting to talk about meth, but whatever man. Glad to see it's still the same bitter people
I'm out, I have no stress in my life, I'm just living the life enjoying drugs, hoes, and retirement, I don't need stress from some rando online no thank you

62041625
>>62038628
how else would u describe it?

let me put it to you this way

i dont dream of living like a poor person in a third world country

why the FUCK would i wanna do that for the rest of my life?

62042997
>>62033249
>>62038628
woah wait bro come back, ill send you a pic of my stash noooo I have kurobaex too D:

62043010
>>62038628
>>62041625
BROTHERS WE ALL EAT METH. WE NEED TO BIND TOGETHER STOP FIGHTING. STOP IT.

>>62033249
>I've tried 20-50mg in a capsule, but it didn't start feeling good until like 60-80mg+

Brother I guarantee you 1000% you have some unpure stuff. 50mg sent me to the ER and they had to pump me with Ativan. There is no shot you did 120mg and "only then did it feel it hit hard", you would've been coughing from your heart trying to do self-cpr because of the severe arrythmia you'd have

psychonaut says oral meth 50mg at 100% purity is considered like... MAX dose. yes there's no "MAX" since you get tolerance but that is still just genuinely a very very large dose beyond recreational. the truth is you cannot extract full "recreational value" from oral meth because it works like vyvanse or adderall XR; the increase in dopamine is still fucking nutty but its GRADUAL.

62043015
>>62041625
>why the FUCK would i wanna do that for the rest of my life?
the point he's making is cost of living arbitrage. and it may have better "value" even if it is technically worse. because you're paying $10 for 80 value vs $100 for 100 value.

62043019
>mfw were taking financial advice from a bunch of schizophrenic tweakers

62043026
>>62024567
>Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH
I did that sober. Don't need no meth to buy some ETH, heh.

62043031
>>62043026
>p00rfugg id
Heh.

62043034
>>62043019
meth use = gains
this is financial advice

62043095
>>62043026
>>62043031
that has to be one of the best thread IDs i've seen lol
>>62043019
nigger we only eat it, wait im not sure about "AsBpaAJT"/"v4UPS/8N" but 2 of us only eat it so not traditional tweakers. you know only 3% of meth users eat it right heheheh. consider us the JEWS of the meth world (elite).

seriously though >>62043034 is correct

62043098
>>62043095
>tweakers
that being said I understand the irony of this considering I crashed out and there is history of it right here in this thread. now I look retarded

62043368
>>62024595
It's best to not even start OP because then you because a whiny sanctimonious old cunt like this for life telling stories no one cares to hear to go along with his equally unsolicited advice. It's either that or you become religious which is just as gay. Steer clear OP!

62043509
>>62043015
except youre living impoverished in a third world nation...

62043530
>>62024567
>assisted euthanasia pods
>Should be manditory for drug users.

62043547
>>62024669
>>62025279
What the fuck is going on with MSFT?
How is this not a great entry?

62043801
>>62043547
might actually slurp this

62043978
>>62043547
Apple is eating their lunch

62043979
i did meth once in bangkok in 2016 while staying in the flat of a shemale

it was my first time but i smoked 8-10 puffs of crystal meth i was thinking its like weed

i got very horny after that but i couldnt get hard so i sucked her for one hour, she was even recording me

the next 3 days traumatized me as i was alone in bangkok heat with paranoia and hallucinations

woke up the 4th day (after 3 days without sleep) on the floor of the bathroom of a luxury condo near thong lor and a cockroach was running near my face

i felt sick for one week after that and went back home buying a new ticket

would i do it again?


hmmmm may be just one puff

62046039
>>62025279
I hit a clean 10x on Siren, rolled it into BTC, and now it’s chilling on Babylon. Self-custody intact, earning on the side.

Digital gold, anon.

item.title: BTC Black Swan Event — 55 replies — 14.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC Black Swan Event

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-03-28 23:33 UTC

OP

THIS IS IT!!!!
HERE WE GOOOOOOOOOOOO

Early replies (first 3)

62039162
What the fuck is happening...

62039175
>>62039162
crabbing

62039176
Posting in epic bread

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62040220
>>62040054
>>62040114
I used BTC all the time when it was >100k with apps like oobit. My entire last year Thailand trip was paid with BTC.
>But muh taxes
I'm not American. Our IRS equivalent is living in the stone age.

62040521
Here you go retards:

The recent drop to $65,000–$66,000 is being attributed to rising 10-year Treasury yields (hitting a 1-year high of 4.5%) and intensified retail selling.

62040545
>>62040054
If you were in Dubai trying to flee the war, would you rather have your wealth in a crypto wallet or in bricks of gold stored in some local banks vault? Only poors don't understand the use case of something that lets you move wealth around the globe with 0 friction

62040700
>>62040545
bitcoin ledgers are public so have fun making yourself a drone strike target.

what you are actually looking for is XRP.

62040745
>>62040545
>bricks of gold stored in some local jews vault
I have gold and I would never store it like this

62040818
>>62040745
im sure its safer in your stick house
when the shit really hits the fan, no one will trade your shiny rock for cans of food. assuming it doesnt get stolen by armed joggers first.

62040830
>>62040700
it has to keep its value to be a store of value

62040895
>>62040521
I thought it was Marathon dumping everything they had to desperately pay off debt?

62041034
>>62040830
bitcoin is doing almost as bad in the same time frame...
and infinitely worse if you zoom out up to like 5 years...
besides your use case wasn't about store of value it was about evading governments. XRP is a lot better than BTC for that.

62041050
>>62040054
m8 i dont give a crap if its real or not. It makes me easy money, if handle correctly

62041059
>>62041050
>>62040054
Im OP btw. Somehow my id change even though i use the same wifi

62041071
>>62039143
Overture, curtains, lights
This is it, tonight's the night

62041093
>>62039143
You retards really don't know what a black swan even is lmao
It has already came and went.
>>62039223
>The price went down in a completely different way at a completely different spot
>IT'S THE SAME PUTTURN GOIS!!
This guy can't even into TA

62041217
>>62041093
How do you define a low? Because we've broken below the low of March 9th.

62041609
>>62041217
That's not even a low. That's just random micro noise, pure chop.
Lows are defined as the low of an impulse move.

The move from feb 24th to march 16th is one move with one low.

There is for certain one low, ~60k. The second low is extremely debatable, and might not be a valid low. But, probably is because it creates a new high in the range.
But, without a shadow of a doubt, 66 and 67k are NOT lows.

62041745
>>62039143
>""Black Swan""
Yeah, that's not what's happening.
>Sell off was telegraphed a mile away with options expiring and MARA being desperate for cash
>Dumb fucks seriously thought 75k was a realistic max pain threshold in a bear market, they get what's coming to them
>Everyone already prepped with buy orders at 65k
>Recovery back to 71k expected by monday at the soonest if all continues as is and Trump stays on the golf course and out of the war room

62041768
>>62041609
they are lows compared to yesterday

62041794
>>62041745
I bought in at 68. How am I doing? Let's just say it would be the difference between 1.09 and 1.14 Bitcoin

62041922
>>62041768
That's a completely meaningless sentence. Lows are structural. Intraday lows are just noise.
Perspectives like yours are exactly why people don't believe in TA. Because they cannot accurately define what a low is. They'll see random choppy noise and call it lower lows, then the price will flip to the upside and break a high and they'll say TA is useless.


Calling every little bit of chop a low or a high is just retarded. If you cannot accurately define what highs and lows are, you're doomed to be chopped up and stopped out.

62041939
>>62039143
THIS IS IT
*bangs fingertip on table*
THIS IS IT

62041976
All you have to do is look at the weekly to see these are completely different patterns.

62041994
>>62041794
My opinion? Hold for now until shit stabalises. Set you next buy order at 67.2k if you want to be cautious and avoid buying blood. Next cycle will probably peak at 71k, maybe 72k if the market starts feeling bullish but there's no way we're going to see any massive bullruns anytime soon.

62042239
>>62039143
Sundump imminent.

62042587
>>62042239
Highly unlikely for the simple reason that there's nothing left to dump.

62042791
>>62041745
>>Recovery back to 71k expected by monday at the soonest

Why is this expected? Ask any ai and they say it's unlikely.

>>62041994
Of course I'm going to hold it. I'm not going to lose several thousand by being impatient.

62042808
>>62041994
When Jews get what they want, Bitcoin goes up. When they don't get what they want, Bitcoin goes down. Looks like they'll be getting 10,000 American troops this weekend so we'll find out if my metric is reliable

62042836
>>62042791
>ask any ai
And there's your problem. Do your own analysis, and don't listen to any AI. All of them tell you to be a good goy and steer clear of trading entirely.
The 71k figure is based on the wall of 65k buy orders ready to spring the price back, and past patterns showing that the previous stability point of the last cycle usually ends up being the peak of the next. It's widely theorised this is going to continue till at least October/November where it will probably be around the 50k mark.
This is all dependant on Trump doing absolutely fucking nothing for the next 48 hours though. The weekend has to be quiet, or punters are going to panic sell, as if USD is somehow going to save them.

62043738
>>62041939
Great movie imo

62043749
>>62039175
the BLACK SWAN CRAB is upon us! IF THINGS DON'T GO UP EVERY SECOND IT'S A BLACK SWAN!!!!!

62046048
>>62039195
If it dips under that range, I’m just buying more and moving it straight into a trustless Bitcoin vault.

item.title: baggies BTFO — 32 replies — 13.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
baggies BTFO

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-03-29 01:10 UTC

OP

62044277
>>62044256

62044281
>>62044256

62044293
>>62044277
this guy fucks

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62044296
>>62044256
Are you stupid? We are already past the arrow. We are nearing the bottom by now.

62044297
Bitcoins are still on sale, sisters! Get them while they're cheap!

62044299
>>62044256
hes correct giga dump is incoming
2 more weeks

62044301
>>62044277
this, the nigger should put the second arrow 1 point higher..... fuck this nigger op and his whole bloodline!

62044328
>>62044277
Obviously this. We just crab for a while now. Maybe a slight capitulation dump to 40k when stocks tumble and liquidity dries up.

62044338
>>62044296
Seems like you can't read a chart brother. It's painfully obvious the bottom will be 40k.

62044349
>>62044299
2 more weeks until the super cycle starts!!!!

62044368
>>62044338
40k is near 60k
Delusional bobos think we're hitting lower lows out of nowhere.

62044370
>>62044368
nigga learn how to maths, thats a -30% drop

62044379
>>62044349
stop quoting cancers of crypto pls!

62044381
>>62044256

62044386
>>62044381
we are in january 2022

if trump keep shitting in the jam bitcoin could go to 30k

40k is 100% sure

62044431
>>62044386
trump is a nonrelevant nigger, DEATH TO SATAN!

62044440
Attached is the non-retard analysis.See you at 30k.

62044507
>>62044440
these are the dumbest meme lines I have ever seen

62044536
>>62044256
you are comparing a 45% rally with a 25% rally
there was no bulltrap yet and weekly rsi is too low, so if it drops below 60k it will bulldiv across multiple HTFs
needs longer consolidation or stronger bounce

62044559
>>62044256
how about this?

62044614
>>62044297
Waiting for the 67.2 snap, otherwise it's just gonna crab

62045615
>>62044614
American market isn't biting for some fucking reason. Crabbing it its.

62045624
>>62044256
I have so much dry powder to ape in with I really hope it crashes to 30k range but literally everyone is expecting prices to go down and are extra bearish because of the war which is why I am starting my DCA now

62045735
>>62045624
It's not going to go below 60k. There's been multiple attempts to force it down to 50, all have failed.

62045755
>>62044381
This is probably correct. All retards waiting for 30k are going to miss the bottom (again)

62045757
>>62044277
Why would anyone buy Bitcoin again after all the drops?

62045781
>>62044256
>Bobo can't into TA
someone teach them PLEASE

62045808
That is all

62045863
>>62044256

62046061
>>62044381
3 legs up, 3 down. Bear flag waiting for confirmation then a dump to sub 40k.

62046237
>>62045757
Because it then goes up, you fucking blind nigger.

62046255
>>62045755
>30k
yeah theyre retards
>60k
also retards
truth is in the middle, 45k~ or so, maybe 40k-50k

item.title: Who’s buying BTC at the dip? — 51 replies — 13.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Who’s buying BTC at the dip?

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-03-28 23:46 UTC

OP

Dip incoming, time to stack or wait it out?
Share your moves, bags, or strategies. Let’s see who’s taking advantage of the dip.

Early replies (first 3)

62025264
>>62025259
Might wait another couple of months...

62025266
>>62025264
Try a year.

62025274
>>62025264
Like how many months?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62033836
>>62025259
I'm buying.
Time in the market better than timing the market I always say.

62033874
>>62031290
Let’s see how low BTC goes this year. Still stacking and staking mine on Babylon. Better than just letting it sit.

62034106
>>62033836
Buy more
>>62033874
hold is the best option

62034113
>>62034106
I think staking somewhere is just another shit

62034130
>>62031831
Whats chomo coin

62034516
>>62034106
Holding is fine, but why not earn on it now that native staking exists? Think about it, anon.

62034519
>>62031274
Well, depends on you anon

62034531
>>62034113
Sounds like you mean centralized platforms. This isn’t just some random place to stake, it’s designed differently, maintaining our control.

62035042
>>62025418
You can never catch the bottom, just DCA and stake on a good BTCFI that keeps BTC Native

62035048
>>62034519
It only makes sense to hold right now if you don't have time to play the game. But it doesn't take much effort to set buy orders at 69k, sell orders at 70/71k, and watch the money roll in. It's easy money right now.

62036008
>BTC
I bought DOGE at the dip. It's gonna moon this time for sure.

62036354
>>62031293
You're doing the right move ser

62038277
>>62035042
That’s what I’m doing as well, anon. I wonder why they haven’t realized this approach yet. But it’s not too late anyway.

62038755
>>62035048
You also have an option to earn from that instead of just holding with no return

62038963
>>62036008
doge

Lol

62038989
>>62033874
bitcoin defi is interesting

62039027
>>62038989
wrapped btc isn't defi

62039045
>>62025259
Hold till $1M

62040086
>>62038989
Yeah, it is. You should also look into Trustless Bitcoin Vaults, which will open up more ways to use BTC without giving up control.
>>62039027
Yup, I know, but that’s not what I meant. You can check it again.

62040127
>>62039045
I'd love to know that

62040628
>>62025259
>What about bch

62040638
LINK
ICP
ETH
all dead

62040666
>>62040628

62040670
gimme more cash orange boy

62040730
>>62025259
Slurping up this gay ass fake ass Bobo trap.
>>62025264
This is the average market (non)participant, and they're going to get left behind

62043271
>>62025264
Since we can't really predict the bottom, why not buy in fractions and stake on babylon?

62044082
>>62040628
I'm not buying

62044190
>>62025292
I'm not only buying, I'm staking on babylon, its worth going all in at this point

62046076
>>62040638
All dead? Hmmm I don't think so

62046077
>>62040666
Lol

item.title: If you visit the fast food restauraunt I work at, especially during the weekend, I hate you. — 14 replies — 12.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
If you visit the fast food restauraunt I work at, especially during the weekend, I hate you.

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-29 02:22 UTC

OP

If you visit the fast food restauraunt I work at, especially during the weekend, I hate you. That's the secret about all fast food employees. We fucking hate you. Immediately upon seeing your face, we are thinking nasty thoughts about you. Nepo baby. Nigger. Bourgeois. Street shitter. HR roastie. MIGAt. We fucking hate you. The smile is a lie.

Early replies (first 3)

62045752
>>62045737
I feel sorry for all you but it is what it is, it's not my fault you ended up doing a shitty job and you don't have the balls to quit. Of you want to find someone to really hate maybe you should look yourself in the mirror

62045762
thats just you, youre a sociopath

62045859
Poorfags in service work are why I hardly ever eat out anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62045872
How much bodily fluid goes into the food on a typical day?

62045905
Spare me this gay little diatribe and put the fries in the bag bro

62045907
>>62045737
I never order in person. I am nothing but a number on a screen to you. You are nothing at all to me.

62045908
i assume this for everyone

62045910
>>62045907
doordashGOD...

62045946
>>62045737
The feeling is mutual but my job actually matters, so go ahead and put the fries in the bag. When you don't show up to work automated labor gets that much cheaper.

62046093
>>62045737
Make the fucking food wagie. Shut your mouth

62046162
>>62045737

> biting the hand that feeds you

This is why you're poor.

62046180
>>62045737
Nobody cares

62046241
>>62045737
Good thing i don't eat goyslop.
All the saturated fat, preservatives, salt makes me sick. I will cook my own food at home using finest ingrediants. I ain't paying you wagie!

62046427
Wagie wagie get in the cagie

62044117

62044122

62044755

62044765

62046071
>>62043185

62046086
